## Checklist

- [ ] Assets are organized in correct folders (ar/, rpg/, vr/, web/, shared/, metadata/)
- [ ] All large files (>5MB) are tracked by Git LFS
- [ ] Git LFS pointers are committed (not actual binary files)
- [ ] Asset manifest will be auto-generated by CI workflow
- [ ] No debug files or temporary assets included
- [ ] Documentation updated (README.md, ASSET_MANAGEMENT.md if applicable)
- [ ] PR is scoped to a single purpose
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
